'''Trailia''' was a low-tech planet, located in the [[Trailia system/Legends|Trailia system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], on the fringes of known space. It was the homeworld of the [[Trailian]]s. It was a technologically primitive world with thick jungles.<ref name="WEG" />

==History==
The first to discover the world, [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Cronal]] established a hidden laboratory in the planet's jungles after conquering the world, guarded by dangerous animals and twisted villagers, where he experimented on transforming the Trailians into a race of dark warriors. He was [[Battle of Trailia|defeated]] by a group of adventurers, but survived the encounter.<ref name="WEG" />

==Appearances==
